svg.text: AC-Rearmed medieval town · top-down · muted palette · quiet ground · tiled roofs · canal + bridges · a few roofed alleys that fade for you · living shopfronts
Alley through building — roof goes translucent for YOUR player inside (cutaway)
Roof overhang — walkable, PURELY VISUAL cover (hides who's under it)
Shop sign — every building gets a purpose (blacksmith, tavern, bakery…)
